_comment: T-16a1 P4 â€” the SINGLE source of truth for the theme-bundle font whitelist. Consumed by frontend/scripts/gen-theme-fonts.mjs, which emits the twin generated files (themeFonts.generated.ts + server/ocserverd/theme_fonts_gen.go). `tokens` are the --font-* CSS custom properties a bundle's optional `fonts` map may re-value; `families` are the ONLY font-family stack strings a value may be (a closed allowlist â€” never an arbitrary string, never a url()/@font-face). Each family's `stack` holds letters, spaces, commas, hyphens and quotes ONLY â€” no CSS structure characters, no url(), so it cannot carry an injection payload. `label` is the friendly display name shown in the editor dropdown.

families.label: Serif
families.stack: "Noto Serif TC", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif
